definitions.definition: To leave behind or give up completely
definitions.example: They had to abandon the project due to lack of funding.

definitions.definition: The power or skill to do something
definitions.example: She has the ability to learn languages quickly.

definitions.definition: In or to a foreign country
definitions.example: He dreams of studying abroad.

definitions.definition: Not present in a place
definitions.example: Three students were absent from class today.

definitions.definition: To take in or soak up something
definitions.example: The fabric absorbs moisture quickly.

definitions.definition: A distinctive way of pronouncing a language
definitions.example: She speaks English with a French accent.

definitions.definition: To agree to receive something offered
definitions.example: I happily accept your invitation.

definitions.definition: The means or opportunity to approach something
definitions.example: Students have access to the library until midnight.

definitions.definition: An unfortunate event occurring unexpectedly
definitions.example: The accident caused a traffic jam for hours.

definitions.definition: To reach or accomplish a goal
definitions.example: She worked hard to achieve her dreams.

definitions.definition: To gain possession of something
definitions.example: The company acquired a smaller startup.

definitions.definition: To adjust to new conditions
definitions.example: Animals must adapt to changes in climate.

definitions.definition: An unusual and exciting experience
definitions.example: Their road trip was a great adventure.

definitions.definition: To offer suggestions or recommendations
definitions.example: I advise you to double-check your work.

definitions.definition: To influence or have an impact on
definitions.example: The weather can affect your mood.

definitions.definition: To have enough money to pay for something
definitions.example: We can afford a new car this year.

definitions.definition: Belonging to the very distant past
definitions.example: They discovered an ancient tomb in Egypt.

definitions.definition: Occurring once every year
definitions.example: The annual festival attracts thousands of visitors.

definitions.definition: Feeling nervous or worried
definitions.example: She felt anxious before the exam.

definitions.definition: Clearly visible or understood
definitions.example: It was apparent that he was lying.

definitions.definition: To recognize the value or significance of something
definitions.example: I appreciate your help with this project.

definitions.definition: To make an effort to accomplish something
definitions.example: She will attempt to break the world record.

definitions.definition: An even distribution of weight enabling stability
definitions.example: You need good balance to ride a bicycle.

definitions.definition: An agreement or something bought cheaply
definitions.example: This coat was a real bargain.

definitions.definition: A fence or obstacle that prevents movement
definitions.example: Language can be a barrier to communication.

definitions.definition: Under or below something
definitions.example: The cat hid beneath the bed.

definitions.definition: An advantage or gain
definitions.example: Regular exercise has many health benefits.

definitions.definition: Having a sharp, unpleasant taste
definitions.example: The coffee was too bitter for her.

definitions.definition: To hold someone responsible for wrongdoing
definitions.example: Don't blame yourself for the mistake.

definitions.definition: To take the trouble or cause inconvenience
definitions.example: Don't bother calling him; he won't answer.

definitions.definition: A line that marks the limits of an area
definitions.example: The river forms the boundary between the two countries.

definitions.definition: Exceptionally clever or bright
definitions.example: She had a brilliant idea for the campaign.

definitions.definition: Having the ability or skill to do something
definitions.example: He is capable of solving complex problems.

definitions.definition: To take possession or control of something
definitions.example: The photographer captured the sunset beautifully.

definitions.definition: Care taken to avoid danger or mistakes
definitions.example: Exercise caution when driving in the rain.

definitions.definition: A task or situation that tests abilities
definitions.example: Climbing the mountain was a real challenge.

definitions.definition: The mental and moral qualities of an individual
definitions.example: Honesty is an important character trait.

definitions.definition: A condition or fact affecting a situation
definitions.example: Under no circumstance should you open the door.

definitions.definition: A state of physical ease and freedom from pain
definitions.example: She settled into the chair with comfort.

definitions.definition: To give an order or directive
definitions.example: The general commanded his troops to advance.

definitions.definition: To examine for similarities and differences
definitions.example: Compare the prices before making a decision.

definitions.definition: To strive against others to win
definitions.example: Athletes from around the world compete in the Olympics.

definitions.definition: To focus one's attention or effort
definitions.example: I need to concentrate on my studies.

definitions.definition: Feeling sure of oneself and one's abilities
definitions.example: She felt confident about passing the test.

definitions.definition: Being aware of one's surroundings or thoughts
definitions.example: He was conscious of the noise in the room.

definitions.definition: The result or effect of an action
definitions.example: Every action has a consequence.

definitions.definition: Occurring continuously over a period of time
definitions.example: The machine requires constant maintenance.

definitions.definition: To hold or have within
definitions.example: This box contains old photographs.

definitions.definition: To give something to a common cause
definitions.example: Everyone should contribute to the team effort.

definitions.definition: To communicate or transmit an idea
definitions.example: Her words conveyed deep emotion.

definitions.definition: To persuade someone to believe something
definitions.example: He convinced me to try the new restaurant.

definitions.definition: The ability to do something that frightens you
definitions.example: It took courage to speak in front of the crowd.

definitions.definition: Eager to know or learn something
definitions.example: Children are naturally curious about the world.

definitions.definition: A period of ten years
definitions.example: Technology has advanced rapidly in the past decade.

definitions.definition: To announce formally or officially
definitions.example: The president will declare a national holiday.

definitions.definition: To decrease or become weaker
definitions.example: The population of the village has declined.

definitions.definition: To protect from harm or attack
definitions.example: Soldiers defend the country's borders.
